{{CargoRelic
|name=Rubber Suit
|class_id=20356
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=An outfit made of special rubber, very light and stretchy. The tight-fitting design enables the wearer to move like water during battle, and the isolated nature of rubber enables them to walk into an electric field and safely out.
|fame=15
|art=16
|fth=14
|civ=14
|tech=31
|ss1=Against Thundos, DMG +300%
|ss2=Against Thundos, DMG +400%
|ss3=Against Thundos, DMG +500%
|ss4=Against Thundos, DMG +500%
|ss7=Against Thundos, DMG +500%<br> (Awakened)
}}
